picks.title: Third Annual Cinco de Mayo Festival
picks.why: San Jose's Third Annual Cinco de Mayo Festival celebrates Mexican heritage with parade, live entertainment, and vendors.

picks.title: Les Miserables (Touring)
picks.venue: San Jose Center for the Performing Arts

picks.title: Friends of the Library Book Sale
picks.why: Friends of the Library Book Sale offers stacks of discounted books—perfect for readers hunting treasures on Sun, May 3 11:00 AM.

picks.title: SJSU Theatre Presents: Kingdom of Cards
picks.why: SJSU Theatre's free staging of Rabindranath Tagore's Kingdom of Cards brings literary classics to life on Sun, May 3 2:00 PM.
